stemHtml: How can you avoid areas with a high concentration of ice crystals?

options.a: Think ahead of the areas where ICI (Ice Crystal Icing) can be expected and avoid thunderstorms in the upwind direction.
options.b: Think ahead of the areas where ICI (Ice Crystal Icing) can be expected and avoid thunderstorms in the downwind direction.
options.c: Climb above the area where Ice Crystal Icing is expected.
